default._ww-text_text: In auto mode, the breadcrumb reads and reflects the current URL path automatically. The trail shown above will update based on the live page URL during runtime.

_ww-text_text.en: A 4-item minimal breadcrumb. All intermediate items are linked to "#" while the last item renders as the active current page. Separated by a "•" dot character.
ww-breadcrumb · Component Documentation · WeWeb Design System

default._ww-text_text: A navigation element that shows users their current location within a website hierarchy.
A 3-item breadcrumb in manual mode with a "/" text separator. The last item represents the current page with no link.
A 5-item breadcrumb showing a deep navigation hierarchy using the "›" chevron-style text separator.
Each breadcrumb item includes a Phosphor icon displayed before the label. The iconElement slot is used as a template injected per item.

default.customSeparator: <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M6 4l4 4-4 4"/></svg>

default._ww-text_text: A breadcrumb using an inline SVG caret-right in customSeparator as the visual separator instead of a plain text character.
